activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static dispatch review surface for V-2187 focused on requesting site access before assigning Reyes inside the SLA window.
parsed.css: :root{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#17202a;background:#f4f6f8}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f4f6f8}.dispatch-shell{min-height:900px;padding:22px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr) 360px;gap:18px}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d9e0e7;border-radius:8px;padding:16px}.queue{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}.visit-row{border:1px solid #dbe3ea;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;background:#fff;text-align:left}.visit-row.active{border-color:#1f7a63;background:#edf8f4}.kicker{font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#657384;font-weight:700}.h1{font-size:24px;margin:6px 0 4px}.muted{color:#5f6f7f}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;background:#eef2f6;color:#34495e;margin:8px 6px 0 0}.badge.warn{background:#fff3d6;color:#7b5600}.badge.good{background:#e7f6ef;color:#116445}.badge.risk{background:#fdeaea;color:#a12a2a}.stack{display:grid;gap:14px}.grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}.check{display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr;gap:10px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #dbe3ea;border-radius:8px}.mark{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px}.ok{background:#dff3e9;color:#116445}.hold{background:#fff0c2;color:#805b00}.choice{border:1px solid #dbe3ea;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px}.choice.selected{border-color:#bf7a00;background:#fff8e8}.actions{display:grid;gap:10px}.btn{border:0;border-radius:6px;padding:11px 12px;font-weight:800;background:#1f6f5b;color:#fff}.btn.secondary{background:#eef2f6;color:#253241}.btn.warning{background:#bf6b00;color:#fff}.handoff{background:#102a43;color:#fff;border-color:#102a43}.handoff .muted{color:#c8d6e5}.line{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16)}p{line-height:1.42}
parsed.html:
Visit queue

Same-day repair visits

Choose a visit and confirm the next dispatch action.

Selected repair visit

Kitchen freezer repair

Mallory Chen has a priority repair that needs dispatch before the service window closes.

Visit

V-2187

Timing

SLA 4h

Nearest qualified technician

Reyes, 18 min away

Unit fit

Freezer certification confirmed

Readiness checklist
OK
Route

Reyes can reach the site in 18 minutes.

OK
Parts readiness

Replacement fan motor is available at the west depot.

OK
Technician fit

Reyes is certified for this freezer unit.

!
Site access

Customer gate code is missing before dispatch.

Dispatch policy

Same-day SLA repair visits can be assigned when parts readiness and site access are confirmed. Missing access details return to dispatch support before a technician is sent.

Decision path
Assign technician

Ready after site access is confirmed.

Reschedule for parts

Not needed. Fan motor is available.

Escalate SLA risk

Watch the service window if access is delayed.

Request gate code

Best next action because access is the only blocker.

Dispatch handoff

Send to dispatch support

Next ownerDispatch support
Next actionRequest the gate code
Timing constraintAssign Reyes within SLA window

Reason: gate code is missing before the qualified technician can be assigned.
